items.name: Installation
items.description: zero-server is published as a set of focused, standalone scoped packages under `@zero-server/*`. Install only the surfaces you actually use (e.g. `@zero-server/core`, `@zero-server/orm`). For demos or apps that touch most of the surface, the optional `@zero-server/sdk` aggregate re-exports everything in one install. No external dependencies are required — everything is built in.
tips: Every `@zero-server/*` package has zero runtime dependencies outside other `@zero-server/*` packages — npm install is all you need.
TypeScript definitions are bundled inside each scoped package.

items.name: Quickstart
items.description: Create a minimal server with JSON parsing and static file serving in under 10 lines.
tips: Middleware runs in registration order — add parsers before route handlers.
All route methods (get, post, put, etc.) return the app, so you can chain them.
Use app.onError() to register a global error handler for uncaught errors.
